title: lepturus boinensis
intro: Lepturus boinensis, also known as the Asian sprangletop, is a type of grass native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lepturus boinensis include reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Lepturus boinensis is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for use in herbal remedies, often in combination with other plants for enhanced efficacy.
